title: Help to create a custom board
excerpt: Hi, I need help to create a custom board for tracking daily statistics and revenues for various lodges & resorts. Where the properties enter in the form the daily statistics e.g. rooms occupied, # Adults, # Children, #OO…

posts.author: DanWig (Daniel Ludwig)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I need help to create a custom board for tracking daily statistics and revenues for various lodges & resorts. Where the properties enter in the form the daily statistics e.g. rooms occupied, # Adults, # Children, #OOO, #OOS, # of Covers, Rooms revenue, Restaurant & Bars Revenue, C & B Revenue, Other Revenue etc. and this is group by the property and give a daily and monthly report. Is it possible with Monday.com ? and if yes can someone help to design such board.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dan, this is something we can help with. Let’s meet on Zoom to go over the details.

Book a time of us here https://connex.digital/book/monday

Talk soon!

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DanWig ,

Yes, This seems quite possible to me. Let’s book an appointment to discuss this in a bit more detail.

You can book a time using Calendly

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar
Fruition Services

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DanWig,

We have just finished wrapping a project that was centred around reporting and getting the most out of their data.

Happy to chat through and discuss some ideas with you - no charge or expectations.

Let us know when you’d like to sync.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

Peta

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Daniel,

This can definitely be built with Monday.com.
If you are still looking for someone to set this up properly, I can help.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
